listening.title: Listening: Records
listening.transcript: Fansipan is the highest mountain in Vietnam. Ho Chi Minh City has the largest population in the country.

questions.question: Highest mountain in Vietnam: ___
questions.explanation: "Fansipan is the highest mountain in Vietnam."

listening.title: Listening: Comparing prices
listening.transcript: This bag isn't as expensive as that one. This one is cheaper. These two phones are roughly the same price.
